title: mewo's Magic Mirror
description: Uniquely implements Terraria's Magic Mirror item!
body:
> ## mewo's Magic Mirror
### A mod about uniquely implementing Terraria's Magic Mirror item
![The Magic Mirror in an item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66632b39871b7be12ff8f9b1538e35833e489135.png)

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

</center>

# THIS MOD IS ABANDONED!

### SUMMARY

>#### Magic Mirror

The only thing in the mod, and is crafted with 4 iron ingots, 2 iron blocks and a diamond, activating the magic mirror will temporarily reduce your movment speed, and after a short delay, teleports you to your spawnpoint (or the world spawn if you lack a bed), applying blindness for a few seconds and activating a long cooldown. The mirror cannot be used in the Nether or The End however, as the nether suppresses its warping capabilities, and as for the end, the only way out of the end should be the end portal, and as such it is kept this way.

![The Magic Mirror in an item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66632b39871b7be12ff8f9b1538e35833e489135.png)

### Q&A

>Q: Will you update this?

A: No, it's abandoned.

>Q: Can i use this in my modpack?

A: I don't suggest it, but sure.
